commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: I was in the spirit, rapt as it were in an ecstacy into heaven, and saw a throne, and one sitting, representing God the Father. (Witham)

commentaries.author: Victorinus of Pettau
commentaries.content: The throne set: what is it but the throne of judgment and of the King?

commentaries.author: Victorinus of Pettau
commentaries.content: And since the mind of the faithful is opened by the Holy Spirit, and that is manifested to them which was also foretold to the fathers.
